> [@MF-ITuser](https://github.com/MF-ITuser) Thanks for testing! The IR blaster driver has the full Zosung protocol implemented (learn + send via clusters 0xED00/0xE004), but different firmware versions can behave differently in the handshake.
> 
> To debug what's happening on your device, could you share the **app logs** after trying to learn an IR code?
> 
> 1. Go to Homey â Settings â Apps â Universal Tuya Zigbee â View
